W1.design_option: A — component-boundary rolling (no hook file edits required)
W1.mechanism: operatorWindow + rollingAnchorMs state; setInterval tick at ROLLING_TICK_MS (30_000ms) aligned with useShiftDashboardSummary refetchInterval; effective window = operatorWindow ?? computeRollingWindow(rollingAnchorMs); operator commits via TimeWindowSelector onChange bypass rolling

verified.lint: npx eslint --max-warnings=0 exit 0 (auto-fix of import-order warnings)
verified.tests: 5/5 passing — 2 pure helper + 3 component integration (rolling advance, operator override freeze, initial anchor = Date.now())

pitfalls_for_w5: Pre-existing components/shift-dashboard-v3/__tests__/shift-dashboard-v3.test.tsx is fully broken (10/10 failing) — renders without QueryClient and without mocking DeltaBadge/CheckpointButton/CoverageWidget. Not introduced by W1; flag for Phase 2 fix.

Suspense-fallback warning is harmless noise — lazy-loaded WinLossTrendChart is mocked, but React 19 still emits 'A suspended resource finished loading inside a test' warnings. Not a failure; worth documenting.

Query key stability: shiftDashboardKeys.summary(window) uses serializeKeyFilters (value-based). Future rolling patterns MUST verify their key factory uses value-based serialization, or they must stabilize the window object identity.
React 19 + jest.advanceTimersByTime inside act() propagates state updates and re-renders cleanly without manual rerender() calls.
W1.handoff_to_w2: Mount point inside ShiftDashboardV3() immediately after `const { casinoId } = useAuth();` (current file ~line 133). W2 adds one-line `useShiftDashboardRealtime({ casinoId })` there. No further W1 changes needed to prepare.

W2.observer_mechanism: queryClient.getQueryCache().subscribe() — per DA P0-R3-1 cited evidence

validation_stage3.warning: SCHEMA GATE: Spec has schema changes but no explicit schema-verification gate (NOT APPLICABLE — W0 is publication-config only, no schema change)

adversarial_review.human_decision_note: User approved Phase 3 execution without pre-patching EXEC. P0 findings below are DEFERRED — workstream executors MUST address them during implementation (guidance per-workstream in workstream_deferred_p0_guidance).

key_findings: P0-R2-1: SRM has no owning context for table_buyin_telemetry; EXEC asserts 'Financial Telemetry' with no SRM row
P1-R2-1: Exit criterion #4 'how to check' protocol is undefined
P1-R2-2: DEC-DD1(c) has two mechanisms (observer + fallback) - Phase 2 replication risk
P1-R2-3: W3 Layer 2 fact-surface discovery procedure is missing
P0-R3-1: DEC-DD1 observer API IS available (TanStack Query v5 queryClient.getQueryCache().subscribe) - promote from 'assumption' to 'cited'
P0-R3-2: W3 Layer 2 discovery spec'd as RPC-grep catches only 1 of 5 in-scope hooks; must be 2-stage
P1-R3-1: Fixture schema undefined in EXEC
P1-R3-2: Escape-valve threshold (>3 hooks) not in EXEC text
P1-R3-3: DEC-DD2 bundling is ordering constraint, not atomicity
P1-R3-4: Duplicate output ownership (shift-dashboard-v3.tsx) not annotated
P1-R3-5: W4/W5 gate 'type-check' is decorative for doc-only WS

ground_truth_findings.tanstack_query_observer_api: EXISTS at queryClient.getQueryCache().subscribe() - QueryCacheNotifyEvent with action.type='invalidate' (node_modules/@tanstack/query-core/build/legacy/hydration-BlEVG2Lp.d.ts:385-418)
ground_truth_findings.srm_tbt_owner_gap: table_buyin_telemetry has NO owning service row in docs/20-architecture/SERVICE_RESPONSIBILITY_MATRIX.md (rows 117-132). Bridge trigger writes from PFT (PlayerFinancialService) but TBT itself is unassigned.

W2_realtime_hook.guidance: IMPLEMENTER MUST use queryClient.getQueryCache().subscribe() as the observer mechanism (not the fallback per-hook helper). The API is cited in ground_truth_findings above. Filter events via event.type === 'updated' && event.action.type === 'invalidate' && isShiftDashboardKey(event.query.queryKey). Track last-invalidation timestamp per casino_id. Suppress WAL-initiated invalidation within 500ms of a preceding shift-dashboard-keyed invalidation. Inline the code pattern into W5's Replication Checklist as normative.

W3_tests.p0_relevance: P0-R3-2 directly affects W3 Layer 2 scope
W3_tests.guidance: IMPLEMENTER MUST use two-stage discovery for the fact-surface mutation-hook fixture: (1) grep 'createFinancialTransaction|createFinancialAdjustment|rpc_create_financial_(txn|adjustment)' in hooks/ — catches direct RPC callers AND service-wrapper callers; (2) ADD hooks/mtl/use-mtl-mutations.ts:useCreateMtlEntry as trigger-indirect via trg_bridge_mtl_to_finance. FIXTURE SCHEMA: each entry carries {hook_path, hook_export_name, d1_write_mechanism: 'direct_rpc' | 'service_wrapper' | 'trigger_indirect', invalidates_shift_dashboard_keys_today: boolean, rationale: string}. ENUMERATED Day-1 inventory in ground_truth_findings.in_scope_mutation_hooks above — USE as baseline; discovery script should reconfirm, not rediscover.

W4_registry_promotion.p0_relevance: P0-R2-1 (SRM gap) must be remedied HERE
W4_registry_promotion.guidance: IN ADDITION to REGISTRY_FINANCIAL_SURFACES.md amendment, W4 MUST amend docs/20-architecture/SERVICE_RESPONSIBILITY_MATRIX.md to: (1) register the owning service for table_buyin_telemetry — RECOMMENDED: assign TBT to PlayerFinancialService (since trg_bridge_finance_to_telemetry writes from PFT) with a note that ShiftIntelligenceService consumes it read-only via realtime subscription. Alternative: create a 'Financial Telemetry' row. DECIDE based on existing SRM patterns — PlayerFinancialService co-ownership is the smaller change. (2) Add a new row under ShiftIntelligenceService Cross-Context Consumption (SRM:874-879) declaring the new WAL-stream read of table_buyin_telemetry. Changelog entry naming this SRM edit alongside the registry promotion.

W5_replication_checklist.p0_relevance: carries P1-R2-1, P1-R2-2 from DA findings
W5_replication_checklist.guidance: Section 2 (Invalidation-Coordination Pattern) MUST: (a) designate the observer-based mechanism (P0-R3-1) as CANONICAL; (b) label per-hook helper fallback as 'emergency fallback only, requires amendment-review before Phase 2 adoption'; (c) include the full observer code pattern from node_modules/@tanstack/query-core as a transferable snippet. Section 4 (exit criterion #4 checklist) MUST enumerate explicit checks: for each ADR-050 §4 E1/E2/E3 and §3 rules 1-4, cite the concrete file/line where the slice satisfied it; any deviation listed with structural/cosmetic classification. Historical-context footer references archived EXEC-066/066a/066b and 3 investigation memos (DEC-ARCHIVAL).

phase_1.name: Phase 1 - Foundation (publication + rolling window)
phase_1.dispatch_protocol: Send SINGLE message with TWO Skill tool calls — Skill(backend-service-builder) for W0 + Skill(frontend-design-pt-2) for W1

phase_2.name: Phase 2 - Realtime hook + mount
phase_2.dispatch_protocol: Skill(frontend-design-pt-2) for W2 — MUST include W2_realtime_hook deferred P0 guidance in prompt

phase_3.name: Phase 3 - Contract-property tests
phase_3.dispatch_protocol: Skill(e2e-testing) for W3 — MUST include W3_tests deferred P0 guidance (2-stage discovery + Day-1 inventory) in prompt

phase_4.name: Phase 4 - Promotion + Replication Checklist
phase_4.dispatch_protocol: Single message with TWO Skill(lead-architect) calls — W4 MUST include SRM amendment per W4_registry_promotion guidance; W5 MUST include W5_replication_checklist guidance for canonical observer pattern

on_clear_then_resume: 2. Pipeline reads this checkpoint, finds status='paused', current_phase=0, pending_workstreams=[W0..W5]
3. Load EXEC-068 at exec_spec_path for full workstream contracts
5. For each workstream dispatch, consult workstream_deferred_p0_guidance and INJECT relevant DA findings into the Skill prompt so executors don't silently inherit the blind spots
6. After each phase, run the gate, update this checkpoint (completed_workstreams, gates_passed, artifacts), set status='paused' at next gate, await human approval
8. On completion, run DoD gate + E2E mandate gate (W3 covers this); update MVP-ROADMAP.md; set status='complete'

tasks_to_recreate_on_resume.subject: Phase 4: DoD validation + E2E mandate + MVP update
